reasoning: VIX at 26.45 and RISING +9.43 pct (HIGH regime) = significant macro headwind. Rising VIX typically precedes pullbacks or increased volatility. However, overnight gap up +$0.96 and bullish ribbon (BULL stack, 88¢ spread) suggest bulls have some conviction on this bounce. Conflict between macro fear (VIX) and technical setup (ribbon+gap). No major events today, clean entry windows. Macro backdrop is RISK_OFF, but amplitude/direction uncertain until open.

Overnight gap up +$0.96 (0.15 pct) shows modest bullish overnight sentiment, but small relative to VIX move
Ribbon bullish (BULL, 88¢ spread) creates technical floor, but VIX spike typically dominates in risk-off regimes
No macro events on calendar for 2026-04-07 — clean entry windows post-9:35 ET, but macro sentiment remains contested
Sector rotation mixed: XLE +0.96 pct (energy), XLF +0.75 pct (financials), XLK flat (tech) = defensive/commodity bid, less conviction growth
market_state_summary: Macro is RISK_OFF (rising VIX + HIGH regime), but technicals show resilience (bullish ribbon, small gap up). This is a contested market. Bearish bias on macro, but watch for ORB breakdown/breakdown tests — gap up + ribbon bulls could hold. Entry bias = cautious bearish with quick TP (don't hold through vol spike).
